hero.title:
Multi-Agent Coordination
MCP Server
hero.subtitle: Coordinate multiple AI agents editing the same codebase. File locking, messaging, and shared plans — no more conflicts.

audience.title: Built for You
audience.subtitle: Whether you run one agent or ten, Too Many Cooks keeps them in sync.
audience.coordinationDesc: Agents register, lock files, share plans, and message each other — all through MCP tools.
audience.realTimeDesc: Server-sent events push lock changes, messages, and plan updates instantly to all connected agents.
audience.conflictFreeDesc: Advisory file locking prevents agents from editing the same file simultaneously.
audience.sameWorkspaceDesc: All agents connect to one server per workspace. Shared state via SQLite.
audience.vsCodeIntegrationDesc: See agents, locks, messages, and plans in real-time from your editor.
audience.fullVisibilityDesc: Status tool gives every agent a snapshot of who is doing what.

stack.title: Coordination Tools
stack.subtitle: Five MCP tools for multi-agent coordination.

types.title: Why Coordination Matters
types.subtitle: Without coordination, multiple agents create conflicts, duplicate work, and overwrite each other's changes.

hero.title:
多智能体协调
MCP 服务器
hero.subtitle: 协调多个 AI 智能体同时编辑同一代码库。文件锁定、消息传递和共享计划——不再有冲突。

audience.title: 为您打造
audience.subtitle: 无论您运行一个还是十个智能体，Too Many Cooks 都能让它们保持同步。
audience.coordinationDesc: 智能体通过 MCP 工具进行注册、锁定文件、共享计划和互相发消息。
audience.realTimeDesc: 服务器发送事件将锁定变更、消息和计划更新即时推送给所有连接的智能体。
audience.conflictFreeDesc: 建议性文件锁定防止智能体同时编辑同一文件。
audience.sameWorkspaceDesc: 所有智能体连接到每个工作区的一个服务器。通过 SQLite 共享状态。
audience.vsCodeIntegrationDesc: 在编辑器中实时查看智能体、锁定、消息和计划。
audience.fullVisibilityDesc: 状态工具让每个智能体了解其他智能体正在做什么。

stack.title: 协调工具
stack.subtitle: 用于多智能体协调的五个 MCP 工具。

types.title: 为什么协调很重要
types.subtitle: 没有协调，多个智能体会产生冲突、重复工作并覆盖彼此的更改。

footer.tagline: 面向 AI 驱动开发的多智能体协调。
